title: plantago sericea var. obtusata
intro: Plantago sericea var. obtusata, also known as the woolly plantain, is a variety of the plantago sericea species, a type of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of woolly plantain include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Woolly plantain can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, with the dried leaves and roots used in various herbal preparations.
